tickets.subject: Workflow not executing - urgent!
tickets.message: Hello, I've been trying to set up a document processing workflow for the past 3 hours. It won't execute no matter what I do. The workflow is published and all nodes are connected. I'm losing patience with this platform.
Hi! How do I connect my Slack workspace?

tickets.subject: Feature Request
tickets.message: Can you add support for Asana integration? We use Asana extensively and it would be great to have it in TechFlow.

tickets.subject: RE: Enterprise License - Refund Request
tickets.message: We've decided not to move forward with TechFlow. The platform doesn't meet our compliance requirements. Please process our refund of $50,000 for the upfront payment.
My workflow is super slow. Takes like 5 mins to run. Help?

tickets.subject: API Question
tickets.message: What's the rate limit for webhook integrations? I need to process about 2000 requests per hour for my use case.

tickets.subject: Security Question - HIPAA Compliance
tickets.message: We're a healthcare organization and need to ensure TechFlow is HIPAA compliant. Can you provide your BAA and security documentation?
How much for 50 users? Need pricing info ASAP

tickets.subject: Can't login
tickets.message: I just signed up but can't login. Says invalid credentials. I'm using the correct email and password.

tickets.subject: Love the product! One question
tickets.message: TechFlow has been amazing for our team! We've automated 15 workflows already. Quick question - is there a way to export workflow data to CSV for our weekly reports?

tickets.subject: GDPR Data Processing Agreement
tickets.message: We are a EU-based company and require a signed Data Processing Agreement before we can proceed with TechFlow. Can you provide your DPA and confirm your GDPR compliance status?
Hey quick q - does TechFlow integrate with Salesforce?

tickets.subject: Bulk workflow import
tickets.message: Is there a way to import multiple workflows at once from a JSON or CSV file? We have about 200 workflows to migrate from our old system.

tickets.subject: Outage - all workflows stopped
tickets.message: URGENT - All our production workflows have stopped running as of 9am EST. We are losing money every minute. This is a critical outage. Need immediate support.
The analytics dashboard isn't loading. Just shows a blank screen.

tickets.subject: Invoice discrepancy
tickets.message: Our invoice for March shows $199 but we're on the Starter plan at $49. Please review and send a corrected invoice. We need this for our accounting department.

tickets.subject: Webhook payload format
tickets.message: Hi, I'm integrating TechFlow with our internal system via webhooks. Can you share the full payload schema for workflow completion events? The docs seem incomplete.
Love TechFlow! Is there a dark mode? Would be great for late night work

tickets.subject: SSO configuration help
tickets.message: We're trying to configure SSO with Azure AD but keep getting a redirect loop. Our IT team has followed the documentation but it's not working. Can you walk us through the exact steps?

tickets.subject: Terrible service - cancel subscription
tickets.message: This is the worst experience I've ever had with a SaaS product. Your support is useless, the platform crashes constantly, and I've wasted 3 days trying to get a simple workflow running. Cancel my subscription immediately and issue a refund.
Hi! I forgot my password. How do I reset it?

tickets.subject: Startup discount available?
tickets.message: We're a seed-stage startup with 5 employees. Do you offer any startup discounts or special pricing for early-stage companies? We love the product but the Professional plan is a bit steep for us right now.

tickets.subject: Sandbox environment issues
tickets.message: The sandbox mode for testing workflows doesn't seem to reflect the same behavior as production. We're getting different results when we run the same workflow in sandbox vs live. Is this a known bug?
Does TechFlow support multi-language? Our team uses Japanese

tickets.subject: SOC2 Report Request
tickets.message: Our security team requires a copy of your most recent SOC2 Type II audit report before we can approve TechFlow for use in our environment. Can you provide this under NDA?

tickets.subject: Cannot connect Google Drive
tickets.message: Hello! I've been trying to connect my Google Drive to TechFlow for the past hour and keep getting an 'authorization failed' error. I've revoked and re-authorized the connection multiple times. Please help!
Amazing product! We saved 20 hours a week. Thank you!

tickets.subject: API key management
tickets.message: We need to rotate our API keys due to a potential security incident. How do we invalidate the current key and generate a new one without downtime?

tickets.subject: Client sub-accounts feature request
tickets.message: We manage TechFlow for multiple clients. It would be really useful to have a master account that can manage sub-accounts for each client with separate billing. Is this on the roadmap?
Getting 'node credential invalid' error on HubSpot node. Was working fine yesterday

tickets.subject: Downgrade subscription
tickets.message: We want to downgrade from Professional to Starter plan. We're not using the advanced features. How do we do this and will we get a prorated refund for the remaining month?

tickets.subject: Penetration Test Results - Critical Vulnerability
tickets.message: Our internal pentest found what appears to be a SQL injection vulnerability in the workflow query endpoint. I have a detailed report to share. This needs urgent attention from your security team.
How many workflows can I have on Professional plan?

tickets.subject: Workflow running twice
tickets.message: Our order processing workflow is running twice for every trigger. This is creating duplicate records in our database. This is a bug - please fix urgently as it's affecting live orders.

tickets.subject: Getting started question
tickets.message: Hi! I'm new to TechFlow and trying to build my first workflow. I followed the tutorial but I'm confused about the difference between triggers and conditions. Can you explain?
System down? Can't access my dashboard since this morning

tickets.subject: Academic pricing or free tier?
tickets.message: I'm a professor using TechFlow for research purposes. Does TechFlow offer any academic discounts or a free tier for research institutions? Our grant budget is very limited.

tickets.subject: Enterprise contract renewal
tickets.message: Our Enterprise contract is up for renewal next month. We'd like to negotiate pricing for a 3-year commitment with 500 seats. Who should I speak with about this?
Loved the new analytics feature! When will reports export be available?

tickets.subject: Zapier integration broken
tickets.message: Our Zapier integration stopped working after the latest TechFlow update. The Zap shows 'authentication error'. We have critical automations going through this. Need immediate help.

tickets.subject: Nonprofit discount request
tickets.message: We are a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Do you offer discounted pricing for nonprofits? We currently have 20 staff who would benefit from TechFlow.
The mobile view is hard to use. Any mobile app planned?

tickets.subject: Need PO-based billing
tickets.message: Our procurement policy requires purchase order-based billing. Can TechFlow support net-30 invoicing tied to a PO number? This is mandatory for us to proceed.

tickets.subject: Audit logs missing
tickets.message: We need audit logs going back 180 days for a regulatory audit, but the system only shows 90 days. Our Enterprise contract stated extended audit log retention. Please escalate this to your compliance team.
Can workflows be triggered by email? Like when I receive an email in Gmail?

tickets.subject: Team roles and permissions
tickets.message: How do I set up different permission levels for my team? I need some users to only be able to view workflows, not edit them. Is role-based access control available on the Professional plan?

tickets.subject: Third billing error this month
tickets.message: This is absolutely unacceptable. You've charged my card three times this month and each time I've contacted support, nothing gets resolved. I'm going to dispute all charges with my bank and report this to the BBB if this isn't fixed today.
Hi! Does TechFlow support Microsoft Teams notifications?

tickets.subject: FedRAMP Authorization
tickets.message: We are a federal agency evaluating TechFlow. Does TechFlow have FedRAMP authorization or is it in the process of obtaining it? This is a hard requirement for any cloud software we use.

tickets.subject: Workflow performance optimization tips
tickets.message: Hi TechFlow team! I've been a Pro user for 2 years and love the platform. My complex workflow with 40 nodes is starting to run slowly. Do you have any best practices or guides for optimizing large workflows? Happy to share my setup.
